title: Optimized Core
description: This is a modpack core that optimizes the game.  Mainly meant as a base for your own modpack/instance. It only contains optimization mods and for this reason it achives the BEST performance of any modpack!
body:
## The pack

It optimizes the game with the bare minimum amount of mods for best performance. 

**It is mainly meant to be used as a core for modpacks/instances**


**It would be helpful if you could follow the project :)**  

## Updates:

**It is updated as soon as i have time for it or it's logical.**  

> **This is usually 1-7 days.**  

## Requirements:
- Java 17+ on all versions after 1.8.9

## Features:
> ▶️╏**BEST performance among all modpacks!**  
> ▶️╏**It can run on a mere 360MB ram _(when playing on servers)_**  
> ▶️╏**Adds every essential optimization mod**  
> ▶️╏**Very simple!**  
> ▶️╏**Very small size**    
> ▶️╏**You can build whatever you want out of it**  

No configs included  

<details>
<summary>Support&Contacting me:</summary>

## Contacting me:

1. Via Email: void_98.direness683@passinbox.com
2. In the discord server.

**I provide support in both**

</details>
